ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart entry */,
  "shoe_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shoe type */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size chart is applicable (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the size chart is applicable (e.g., Adult, Child, Infant) */,
  "uk_size" REAL /* Shoe size in UK measurement */,
  "us_size" REAL /* Shoe size in US measurement */,
  "eu_size" REAL /* Shoe size in EU measurement */,
  "mm_size" REAL /* Shoe size in millimeters */,
  "inch_size" REAL /* Shoe size in inches */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the size chart is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the size chart was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_shoe_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("shoe_type_id") REFERENCES shoe_types ("shoe_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shoe_types" (
  "shoe_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shoe type */,
  "shoe_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the shoe type (e.g., Casual, Sports) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shoe type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the shoe type is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the shoe type was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shoe_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_rules" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion rule */,
  "from_region" TEXT /* Region of the original size (e.g., UK, US) */,
  "to_region" TEXT /* Region of the converted size (e.g., EU, MM) */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Factor used for the conversion */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the conversion rule is applicable */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the conversion rule is applicable */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the conversion rule is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the conversion rule was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "shoe_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shoe type */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding size chart */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the inventory is stored */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Available stock level for the specified shoe type and size */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the inventory entry is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the inventory was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_shoe_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("shoe_type_id") REFERENCES shoe_types ("shoe_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart related to the feedback */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments provided by the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the customer */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feedback has been addressed */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_data" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the customer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer account is active */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Last purchase date for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_history" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the purchase */,
  "shoe_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shoe type purchased */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart used for the purchase */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the purchase was made */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of purchase */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the purchase entry is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the purchase entry was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_data ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_shoe_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("shoe_type_id") REFERENCES shoe_types ("shoe_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion request */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the request */,
  "from_size" REAL /* Original size before conversion */,
  "to_size" REAL /* Requested size after conversion */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the request was made */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date of the conversion request */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the request is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the request was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_requests_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_data ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_guides" (
  "size_guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size guide */,
  "shoe_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shoe type associated with the guide */,
  "guide_link" TEXT /* Link to the online size guide */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the size guide is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the size guide was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_guides_shoe_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("shoe_type_id") REFERENCES shoe_types ("shoe_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of adjustment made (e.g., chart update, rule change) */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date the adjustment was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the adjustment */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the adjustment is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the adjustment was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_adjustments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
